Subject: Draft language for Certification of Compliance via email
Message:
Sharon and Steve- A few suggested "tweaks".  THX  Ppaula


As you know, Enron's policies regarding business conduct, approved by the Enron Board of Directors, are set forth in Enron's Code of Ethics.  In order to ensure our continuing compliance, please carefully read the policies and re-submit your statement of personal agreement by ___________________________(date).  

The Code of Ethics is available for your review on the Enron Home Page at http://home.enron.com.  In order to ensure our continuing compliance, please carefully read the policies and re-submit your statement of personal agreement by ___________________________(date).  

Use your SAP id or GIS id (global employees only) and certify your compliance at http://hrglobal.enron.com.  In addition, please be sure to include any exceptions to your certification.

If you need assistance, please contact the Integrated Solution Center Help Desk at 713-345-4727.
